servers.name: io.github.navikt/github-mcp
servers.description: Access GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests through secure API integration.

servers.name: io.github.navikt/mcp-onboarding
servers.description: Discover Nav Copilot customizations, assess agent readiness, and generate AGENTS.md for your repos.

servers.name: com.figma/figma-mcp
servers.description: Bring Figma design context into your coding workflow for design-to-code generation.

servers.name: com.vercel/next-devtools-mcp
servers.description: Access Next.js dev server diagnostics, documentation, and upgrade tools.

environmentVariables.name: NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED
environmentVariables.description: Disable anonymous telemetry to Vercel (set to 1)

servers.name: dev.svelte/svelte-mcp
servers.description: Search Svelte 5 and SvelteKit documentation with static code analysis.

servers.name: com.microsoft/playwright-mcp
servers.description: Browser automation for UI testing and debugging with network controls.

packageArguments.name: --isolated
packageArguments.description: Run in isolated browser without persistent state

packageArguments.name: --caps
packageArguments.description: Restrict to core capabilities only (no file upload or install)

packageArguments.name: --blocked-origins
packageArguments.description: Block access to all Nav NAIS ingress domains

packageArguments.name: --block-service-workers
packageArguments.description: Prevent service worker interception of network requests
